tools.name: launch
tools.description: Launch Chrome browser

tools.name: close_browser
tools.description: Close the browser

tools.name: new_tab
tools.description: Open a new tab

tools.name: list_pages
tools.description: List all open pages/tabs

tools.name: navigate
tools.description: Navigate to a URL

tools.name: go_back
tools.description: Go back in browser history

tools.name: snapshot
tools.description: PREFERRED: Use this FIRST to understand page content. Returns accessibility tree with interactive element refs. Much cheaper than screenshots (text only, no vision tokens). Use refs with click_ref/type_ref. Only use screenshot if you need visual/layout context that the snapshot cannot provide.

tools.name: click_ref
tools.description: Click an element by its ref from a snapshot (e.g. "e3"). More reliable than CSS selectors.

tools.name: type_ref
tools.description: Type text into an element by its ref from a snapshot. More reliable than CSS selectors.

tools.name: click
tools.description: Click an element by ref (from snapshot), selector, text, or coordinates

tools.name: type
tools.description: Type text into an element

tools.name: press_key
tools.description: Press a keyboard key

tools.name: select
tools.description: Select a dropdown option

tools.name: scroll
tools.description: Scroll the page

tools.name: wait_for
tools.description: Wait for an element to appear

tools.name: get_text
tools.description: Get text content of the page or a specific element

tools.name: eval
tools.description: Execute JavaScript on the page

tools.name: get_links
tools.description: Get all links on the page

tools.name: get_inputs
tools.description: Get all form inputs on the page

tools.name: screenshot
tools.description: Take a screenshot. IMPORTANT: Prefer snapshot tool first — it is cheaper (no vision tokens). Only use screenshot when you need visual context (layout, images, colors) that snapshot cannot provide. Use ocr=true to extract text locally instead of sending the image.

tools.name: ocr
tools.description: Extract text from an image file using local Apple Vision OCR (no tokens sent to cloud)

tools.name: fill_form
tools.description: Fill multiple form fields at once (instant, no keystroke delay) and optionally submit. Much faster than calling type for each field individually.

tools.name: network_monitor
tools.description: Start or stop monitoring network requests on a page. Start monitoring BEFORE performing actions to capture requests.

tools.name: get_network_requests
tools.description: Get captured network requests. Must call network_monitor(enable=true) first.

tools.name: batch
tools.description: Run multiple actions sequentially in one call. Saves round trips. Use snapshot first to get refs, then batch actions using those refs.

findings.description: Parameter 'url' accepts arbitrary URLs — potential SSRF vector
Parameter 'script' accepts arbitrary string input for execution
Parameter 'path' accepts arbitrary file paths without validation
